validated_commands.format: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && .venv/bin/ruff format src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_check: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ && .venv/bin/ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.notes: uv not on PATH; use python3 -m uv or .venv/bin/ directly. rpds-py build fails with python3 -m uv run ruff (PyPy3.10 compat issue). Use .venv/bin/ruff instead. Excludes: test_audit_report.py (SyntaxError), test_deps_update_command.py (AttributeError), marketplace/ and test_plugin_exporter_schema.py (rpds ModuleNotFoundError). Baseline: ~5972 passed, 106 failed (pre-existing).

coverage_baseline.notes: view command: 34->41 tests (+7 error/display paths). baseline 5972 passing (106 pre-existing fails).

monthly_activity_issue_note: Issue #1087 was closed by maintainer (danielmeppiel) on 2026-05-01 with 'not_planned'. Create new monthly issue each run.
ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]' to strip before text assertions.

testing_backlog.notes: Large complex file ~2804 lines. Core install logic. High risk. Deferred.
34->41 tests in PR #TBD (test-assist/view-error-handling-tests). Error paths now covered.
